text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The Oka Sho, a Classic race and the first race of
the Tiara tour, is about to begin.

text_block_list.name: Male Dober Fan
text_block_list.text:
I've been waiting forever for this race! Come on,
Mejiro Dober! Make this your first tiara!

text_block_list.name: Female Dober Fan
text_block_list.text:
I bet she's going to be absolutely amazing today!
I can't wait to see her in action!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
The crowd is so loud... So this is what the Classic
G1 Oka Sho is like...
choice_data_list:
You've already run in the Hanshin J.F. You can
handle this too.

You've already run in the Hanshin J.F. You can
handle this too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: You're right. This isn't my first G1 race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: The racer I am today... can handle this race!
choice_data_list: Give it your all out there!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I was going to even without you nagging me
about it.
